rulings.Case Title: RUSS BUILDING VENTURE LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. HENNEFER FINLEY & WOOD, LLP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 21, 2023 line 1. CROSS-DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to September 21, 2023. Moving party to provide a tabbed set of courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than August 25, 2023. A set without exhibit tabs previously received by the Court to be picked up from the Outbox (in front of department 501) and re-used for re-submission. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, INC. VS. MARK ANTHONY SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 21, 2023 line 2. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO SET #5 & #6 INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS is continued to August 28, 2023. No later than August 23, 2023 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief, not to exceed 3 pages, to address the effect of July 19, 2023 Order vacating the default on the discovery requests served before the entry of default. Trial is continued to September 5, 2023 to address the discovery dispute prior to trial. In the alternative, Plaintiff may respond to pending discovery by 9:00 a.m. on August 21, 2023. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: ZHAO LIAN CHEN VS. BENNUAR SINAGA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 21, 2023 line 4. DEFENDANTS BENNUAR SINAGA AND DINDA SINAGA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. SFRO 37.9C (b) and (e) provide that "each" tenant is "entitled to receive" and "shall receive" one-half of the relocation payment at the time of the service of the notice to quit. Plaintiff failed to allege that each tenant received this payment as required. Remittance of a check of a lump sum issued to one of, and not each, of the eligible tenants is not compliant with the requirements of the Rent Ordinance. =(501/DAF) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
